narratives.narrative: Threat actor CDB-FIN-11 has been observed in 5 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1199, T1059.001, T1078, T1595, T1476. Average risk score: 9.9/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-FIN-12 has been observed in 3 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1199, T1078, T1595, T1195, T1203. Average risk score: 9.8/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-CN-01 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1078, T1595, T1204.001, T1476, T1547. Average risk score: 9.8/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-CYB-01 has been observed in 37 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2025-55182. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1547.001, T1036, T1595, T1566, T1213. Average risk score: 9.1/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-FIN-09 has been observed in 17 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1036, T1595, T1027, T1567, T1566. Average risk score: 8.8/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-RU-01 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1412, T1078, T1021, T1476, T1547. Average risk score: 8.7/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-IR-02 has been observed in 11 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1036, T1595, T1567, T1027, T1566. Average risk score: 8.3/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-22 has been observed in 20 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1547.001, T1620, T1595, T1027, T1567. Average risk score: 8.3/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-FIN-07 has been observed in 5 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-3055. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1078, T1595, T1204.001, T1111, T1087. CRITICAL: 1 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 7.8/10.
Threat actor CDB-APT-28 has been observed in 3 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1547.001, T1059.001, T1053.005, T1021, T1204.001. Average risk score: 7.4/10.
Threat actor CDB-RAN-01 has been observed in 6 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1547.001, T1199, T1059.001, T1566.001, T1053.005. Average risk score: 7.3/10.

Threat actor UNC-UNKNOWN has been observed in 376 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-4987, CVE-2026-4335, CVE-2026-5122, CVE-2026-4996, CVE-2026-32859. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1547.001, T1620, T1498, T1036, T1595. CRITICAL: 56 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 6.2/10.
Threat actor CDB-RAN-03 has been observed in 6 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1547.001, T1041, T1199, T1071, T1078. Average risk score: 6.2/10.

findings.recommendation: Migrate to ML-KEM (CRYSTALS-Kyber) for key exchange
Replace with ML-KEM or hybrid key exchange

stix_transport.note: TLS 1.3 uses ECDHE - quantum vulnerable for key exchange

jwt_tokens.note: Symmetric crypto - quantum resistant (Grover halves keyspace)

S9_Quantum.recommendation: Begin hybrid key exchange deployment. Inventory all RSA/ECDSA usage for PQC migration.
